docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRERA, JOHNNY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, JOHNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED MAY-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, JOHNNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING AND QA. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
